user.title: Set up Fronius System
user.description: Please provide connection details to Fronius System.

reconfigure.title: Review Fronius System
reconfigure.description: Review and save the connection details for this migrated Fronius entry.

error.unsupported_hardware: Unsupported hardware found. See error log for details.
error.scan_interval_too_short: Scan interval is too short. Minimum 5 seconds.
error.incomplete_api_credentials: Provide both the Web API username and password.
error.invalid_api_credentials: Web API login failed. Check the username and password.

legacy_modbus_only_entry_reconfigure.title: Review migrated Fronius configuration
legacy_modbus_only_entry_reconfigure.description: The Fronius entry "{entry_title}" was created with an older Modbus-only version of this integration. It will keep working, but the configuration model has changed. Open the integration menu and select Reconfigure to review and save the current Modbus and optional Web API settings.

init.title: Set up Fronius System
init.description: Set options for your Fronius System.
